debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
V PO W : Set (Set X)
hWV : W ⊆ V
hW : ∀ A ∈ V, ∃ B ∈ W, B ⊆ A
p : Player
S : Strategy (@chainTree X V) p
x : ↥S.pre.subtree
xs : List ↑V
A : ↑V
ys : ↥(Strategy.pre (@restrict X V W hWV hW p S)).subtree
⊢ ↑(@chainTree.concat X W ((Strategy.pre (@restrict X V W hWV hW p S)).subtree_incl ys) (@choose_pair X V W hW A) ⋯) ∈
    (Strategy.pre (@restrict X V W hWV hW p S)).subtree

failed_attempts:
by
        rw [PreStrategy.mem_subtree_iff_append]
        refine ⟨ys.prop, fun h => ?_⟩
        simp only [restrict, shrink', h, dite_true]
        have : xs ++ [A] ∈ S.pre.subtree := S.pre.subtree_prefix x.prop (by simp)
        rw [PreStrategy.mem_subtree_iff_append] at this
        convert congr_arg choose_pair (this.2 (by simpa [extend_coe] using h))
        sorry⟩

by
        simp only [PreStrategy.subtree_append, ys.prop, true_and]
        intro h
        have : xs ++ [A] ∈ S.pre.subtree := by sorry
        rw [this.2 (by simpa [IsPosition] using h)]
        simp [restrict, shrink']
        sorry⟩

by
        intro k hk hp
        rw [List.length_append] at hk
        rcases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hk) with h | rfl
        · rw [List.get_append_of_lt _ h]
          exact ys.prop k h hp
        · rw [List.get_last _ (by simp)]
          simp [restrict, shrink']
          have : xs ++ [A] ∈ S.pre.subtree := by sorry
          have hA : A = S xs := this.2 _ (by simp) hp
          rw [← hA]
          sorry⟩

by
        rw [PreStrategy.append_mem_subtree]
        refine ⟨ys.prop, (chainTree.concat _ _ _ _).prop, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
        simp only [restrict, shrink', Tree.ExtensionsAt.val]
        have : xs ++ [A] ∈ S.pre.subtree := by sorry
        rw [(PreStrategy.mem_subtree_iff _ _).1 this _ (by simpa using h)]
        sorry⟩
by simp; exact ⟨ys.prop, fun h => by simp [restrict, h]; sorry⟩⟩

by
        intro k hk hturn
        simp only [List.length_append, List.length_singleton] at hk
        rcases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hk) with hk | rfl
        · rw [List.get_append_of_lt _ hk]
          exact ys.prop k hk hturn
        · rw [List.get_last]
          -- This requires the definition to handle parity (see TODO above)
          sorry⟩

by
        simp only [PreStrategy.mem_subtree_append, ys.prop, true_and]
        intro h
        rw [(PreStrategy.mem_subtree_append.mp x.prop).2 (by simpa using h)]
        rfl
by simp only [PreStrategy.subtree_append]; exact ⟨ys.prop, fun _ => sorry⟩⟩

by
        simp only [PreStrategy.mem_subtree_append, ys.prop, true_and]
        intro h
        rw [restrict]
        have : xs = extend hWV ys := by sorry
        rw [← this] at h ⊢
        have : xs ++ [A] ∈ S.pre.subtree := by sorry
        exact (this_1.is_strategy_move h).symm

by
          simp only [PreStrategy.subtree_append, ys.prop, true_and]
          intro h
          simp only [restrict, extend_coe]
          rw [← this.2 h]

by
        intro k hk hpos
        rw [List.length_append] at hk
        if h : k < ys.val.length then
            rw [List.take_append_of_le_length h.le, List.getElem_append_left _ _ h]
            exact ys.prop k h (by rwa [extend_coe, List.map_take, extend_mem_iff] at hpos)
        else
            have : k = ys.val.length := Nat.eq_of_ge_of_lt (Nat.le_of_not_lt h) hk
            subst k
            rw [List.take_left, List.getElem_append_right (by simp)]
            simp
            rw [restrict, shrink']
            simp
            rw [(PreStrategy.mem_subtree_iff S p).1 x.prop _ _ hpos]
